nodes.label: SQLAlchemy db instance
nodes.rationale: Initialized once and bound to Flask app in app.py. Shared across all models.

nodes.label: Maslak Model
nodes.rationale: Represents a chapter/category (muslak) that groups episodes. Ordered episodes are back-referenced via dynamic relationship.

nodes.label: User Model
nodes.rationale: Includes last_login timestamp and is_admin flag. Many-to-many with Episode via Assignment table.

nodes.label: Episode Model
nodes.rationale: Episode status workflow (draft/review/complete) tracks production state. display_order enables manual drag-and-drop sorting within a maslak. Plan field defaults to a structured markdown template.

nodes.label: Comment Model
nodes.rationale: Block-based commenting associates comments with paragraph indices (block_index) in the scenario, enabling contextual feedback rather than free-floating comments.

nodes.label: AuditLog Model
nodes.rationale: Centralized action logging for accountability. Designed with nullable user_id to handle system actions or deleted users. Uses JSON for flexible detail storage.

nodes.label: DEFAULT_PLAN_MARKDOWN
nodes.rationale: Arabic-language default template providing structured sections for episode planning (goals, topics, Quran/Sunnah references, UX vision, assignment, success indicators).

nodes.label: log_activity helper
nodes.rationale: Centralized helper ensures consistent audit logging across all routes. Handles current_user fallback and JSON serialization of details with graceful rollback on error.

nodes.label: update-plans CLI command
nodes.rationale: Backfill utility that sets all episodes to the default plan template. Useful after introducing the template.

nodes.label: clear_audit_log route
nodes.rationale: Admin-only destructive operation. Logs the clear action itself before deletion for meta-auditing.

nodes.label: view_episode route
nodes.rationale: Loads comments and groups them by block_index to support the block-based commenting UI. Uses joinedload to avoid N+1 queries.

nodes.label: export_episode_pdf route
nodes.rationale: Server-side PDF generation using WeasyPrint with inline Arabic CSS (Tajawal/IBM Plex Sans Arabic fonts) and Markdown-to-HTML conversion.

nodes.label: AuditLogAdminView
nodes.rationale: Read-only admin view with custom template to expose a clear-all button. Explicitly disables create/edit/delete.

nodes.label: SecureModelView
nodes.rationale: Base Flask-Admin model view enforcing is_admin check and redirecting unauthorized users to login.

nodes.label: main backup function
nodes.rationale: Standalone script for scheduled database backups. Copies SQLite DB to timestamped file and uploads to DDownload cloud storage via API v2. Designed for PythonAnywhere cron jobs.

nodes.label: Service Worker
nodes.rationale: Implements cache-first strategy for static assets (CSS/JS) to improve load times and offline availability, while leaving dynamic routes to the network. Uses versioned cache for cache-busting.

nodes.label: Frontend script.js
nodes.rationale: Handles drag-and-drop episode reordering, markdown rendering with marked.js, block-based comment UI, inline title editing, and service worker registration.

nodes.label: base.html template
nodes.rationale: Base layout with Arabic RTL direction, Tailwind CSS, Alpine.js mobile nav, flash message auto-dismiss, and PWA manifest/link tags.

nodes.label: Arabic Calligraphy Text (specific wording stylized and uncertain)
nodes.norm_label: arabic calligraphy text (specific wording stylized and uncertain)
